subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-03-28
subcodes.first_line: The teaching of the Cause is through the heat of the Love of God, attraction and enkindlement. Every active headquarter must send Bahá'í teachers to different parts.
subcodes.subjects: @power of love, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
